step.name: classify-pipeline
step.action: Pick one of basic / rag / multi-agent. If both retrieval and tool-use present, classify as multi-agent.

step.name: enumerate-stages
step.action: List the stages present: input always; output always; retrieval iff rag; dialog iff multi-turn; execution iff tool-use.

step.name: map-rails
step.action: For each stage, assign rail_type from threat model (pii-mask, schema-validate, chunk-injection-scan, persona-enforce, tool-allowlist, etc.).

step.name: pick-actions
step.action: Per rail, pick one of block / filter / transform / warn / log using severity ladder: critical+no-safe-fallback→block; high+partial-value→filter; medium→transform; low→warn; observable-only→log.
step.decision-gate: If severity is critical and action is warn — escalate; warning critical violations is forbidden.

step.name: set-tiers
step.action: Allocate latency across tiers: tier 1 regex (1-5 ms), tier 2 classifier (10-50 ms), tier 3 LLM-judge only if budget > 500 ms remains. Drop tier 3 entirely if SLO < 200 ms.

step.name: pick-frameworks
step.action: Per rail, pick framework: dialog→nemo; output-schema→guardrails-ai; safety-class→llama-guard; everything else→custom. Embedded for free safety from Claude / GPT.
